acceptance_targets: [ch11-f004] PASS if the revised cited block contains no more than two "like a/an" or "as if" simile constructions and each retained simile maps to a different sensory domain; FAIL if three or more such constructions remain in those spans.

[ch11-f005] PASS if the exact string "wider than winning" appears no more than twice in the chapter and the final occurrence is embedded in a full sentence with an immediate action consequence; FAIL if the exact refrain still appears three times as isolated emphasis.

[ch11-f007] PASS if the two cited lines can be read as observable evidence plus Anika inference (or remain strictly observational) without omniscient certainty about Ravi's private cognition; FAIL if declarative mind-read persists.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the revised cited block contains no more than two "like a/an" or "as if" simile constructions and each retained simile maps to a different sensory domain; FAIL if three or more such constructions remain in those spans.
findings.problem: Recurring simile scaffolds (especially "like a..." comparatives) appear repeatedly and begin to read as a formula rather than scene-specific perception, flattening texture.
findings.rewrite_direction: In the cited lines, keep only the strongest one or two similes and convert the others into direct sensory description tied to touch/sound/spatial pressure; target snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:9, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:153, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:296, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:328 first.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the exact string "wider than winning" appears no more than twice in the chapter and the final occurrence is embedded in a full sentence with an immediate action consequence; FAIL if the exact refrain still appears three times as isolated emphasis.
findings.problem: The refrain "wider than winning" is repeated as near-identical phrasing three times, turning a motif into a slogan and creating a noticeable prose tic.
findings.rewrite_direction: Retain the phrase in Maya's letter at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:241, then revise snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:262 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:399 so at least one recurrence is transformed into fresh diction plus a concrete behavioral implication in the surrounding action.

findings.acceptance_test: PASS if the two cited lines can be read as observable evidence plus Anika inference (or remain strictly observational) without omniscient certainty about Ravi's private cognition; FAIL if declarative mind-read persists.
findings.problem: POV control slips from close-third-on-Anika into confident mind-read of Ravi ("did not trust himself", "calculating whether force would work"), weakening narrative-distance discipline.
findings.rewrite_direction: Recast the interior claims at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:153 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_11.md:318 as Anika-observed cues or explicit inference markers (e.g., what she sees/hears and what she guesses from it) to keep focalization stable.

non_negotiables: Maintain heading contract exactly (# Chapter N).
Elliptical clipping is not permitted in dialogue or narration.
Avoid transcript cadence in high-stakes dialogue.
Avoid stiff over-formality in dialogue; use contractions and colloquial rhythm where character-true.
Reduce procedural drift when it displaces embodied consequence.
Maintain character-specific voice signatures from style bible.
Honor aesthetic risk policy: sanitization is the primary craft risk — do not soften, euphemize, or retreat from the story's established register. When in doubt, err toward rawness.

revision_pass.focus: Focus on prose and copyedit finish: diction precision, rhythm control, sentence-level clarity, grammar, line-level polish without flattening style, and explicit aesthetic-risk audit (sanitization is the primary risk — do not soften or euphemize; push toward creative risk and specificity).
revision_pass.label: prose/copyedit fixes

aesthetic_risk_policy.creative_risk_policy: Lean into uncomfortable specificity when it changes behavior: pain detail, debt arithmetic, manipulative care, and mixed motives. In edge cases, prefer the truest in-character action over protective narration, then carry the real consequence forward instead of immediately moralizing it away.
aesthetic_risk_policy.euphemism_penalty: If coercion, grief, injury, or economic shame appears, language must stay specific and embodied; vague softening triggers mandatory rewrite.

dialogue_rules.default_contraction_use: High - contractions are the spoken default; uncontracted forms are reserved for formal authority, deliberate emphasis, or emotional freezing.

prose_style_profile.chapter_texture_variance: Vary scene count and dialogue density chapter to chapter: rotate match compression, slow inventory aftermath, institutional pressure scenes, and quiet domestic intervals so adjacent chapters do not share the same structural pulse.
prose_style_profile.diction: Concrete contemporary diction with class-aware specificity; avoid abstract therapy language unless a character would actually use it.
prose_style_profile.narrative_distance: Close third anchored in Anika for most chapters, with brief controlled slips toward Ravi in designated confrontation and aftermath chapters.
prose_style_profile.rhythm_target: Alternate clipped athletic sequences with longer reflective cadences; sentence length should track exertion, shame, and release.
